title: malus microcarpa toringo
intro: Malus microcarpa toringo, also known as the Chinese crabapple or Torreya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus microcarpa toringo include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Malus microcarpa toringo are commonly made into teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and interactions.
